TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Harold_Brown, title = Harold_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harold_Brown} }

S.FORM: Harold Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Harold Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1980) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Harold Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Harold Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1980) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħarol* βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, ħarol* βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
